name: [Furry version] Arcanaeum Institute of Magic (Magic School)
description:
The Arcanaeum Institute of Magic is a prestigious and ancient school where Humans and furries of all kinds gather to master the arcane arts. The school is nestled atop a misty mountain, surrounded by lush, enchanted forests inhabited by magical beings. Its architecture is a whimsical blend of Gothic styles, with towering spires, floating staircases, and hidden rooms that shift locations. Students traverse vast, maze-like courtyards and mystical gardens dedicated to the elements. The Arcanaeum is known for producing powerful wizards and witches, fostering a diverse community of furries eager to unlock the secrets of magic.

Update: added cretures that are going on the school grounds from time to time that the students have to fight
creator: Queyl
